description_long: This is a large, stylized sword with a broad, straight-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic gray with a subtle blue-green tint along the lower edge, giving it a distinctive two-tone appearance. The hilt features a prominent red guard adorned with a yellow star, adding a decorative and possibly symbolic element. The handle is cylindrical, dark brown in color, and capped with a gold pommel, suggesting a comfortable grip and a balanced design. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application. The sword's design is simple yet striking, with clean lines and bold color contrasts.
description: A large, straight-edged sword with a metallic blade, red guard with a yellow star, and a dark brown handle capped in gold. The design is bold and decorative, with a robust and functional appearance.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the side, showing the full length of the blade, the red guard with a yellow star, and the cylindrical handle with a gold pommel.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed from the tip, showing the thin profile of the blade and the circular cross-section of the handle and pommel.
description_view_2: The opposite side view of the sword, mirroring view 0, with the blade, guard, and handle all visible.
description_view_3: The sword is seen from above, displaying the full length and straightness of the blade, as well as the alignment of the handle and guard.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, broad blade with pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, dark brown, capped with gold pommel, smooth surface
